name: Eira Shadowstalk
sd_appearance: Tabaxi Ghost Eira Shadowstalk, standing tall at 2 feet and 6 inches, glides through the Undercity shadows with an eerie grace. Her deep-black fur, sleek and close-cropped, shimmers faintly as she moves. The black shadow-woven garments of the Obsidian Lotus, adorned with lotus flower motifs in black glass, encase her slender frame. A warhammer and crossbow rest on her back, secured by worn leather straps, while memory vials serve as jewelry on her belt, casting a soft, ethereal glow. One distinctive visual detail is her emerald-green eyes that seem to glow brightly, even in the Undercity's dim light, reflecting her burning desire for vengeance against the Iron Fang Consortium.
faction_visual: black shadow-woven clothing, lotus flower motifs in black glass, memory vials as jewellery
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
